title: AI NPCs In Minecraft
description: Interact with AI NPCs in real time in this short adventure.
body:
## About the Mod

Enter a world filled with AI-powered NPCs and embark on a quest to save them from a deadly, evil sorcerer. Experience first-hand the revolutionary power of artificial intelligence in video game dialogue, by following a short questline fueled with tasks, NPC interactions, cinematics and even a boss-fight. This mod is powered by Inworld AI.

## What is Inworld?

Inworld empower game developers with the ability to supercharge their NPC interactions with AI powered conversations.
- **Character Brain**: AI NPCs can learn and adapt, navigate relationships with emotional intelligence, have memory and recall, and are capable of autonomously initiating goals, performing actions and following their own motivations.
- **Contextual Mesh**: Set parameters for content and safety mechanisms, custom knowledge, and narrative controls to give each interaction a personalized context that makes sense for your player and game.

Want to be part of the future? Sign up at [inworld.ai](https://bit.ly/cy4-inworld "Inworld").
